label: AliExpress — Global Marketplace
description: AliExpress — global e-commerce (Alibaba Group). Product search with category filters, listing grid, product detail pages with reviews, cart, checkout. Login via Alibaba account or Google.
source_patterns: Search with filters: type query → select category/sort/price → wait 2-4s for results update
Product grid scroll (infinite): 300-600px per pass, 1-3s pause between (image loading)
Product detail (images, specs, reviews, shipping): deep scroll through tabs/reviews/specs
Add to cart → checkout flow: select variant → add to cart → navigate cart → checkout form
Login flow: email/phone → password → captcha sometimes (risk-based)

scroll.description: Product grid moderate passes, product detail deep scroll (reviews, specs). More browsing/scrolling than typing.

mouse.description: Browsing speed — product exploration, comparison shopping

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate to product search → apply filters → scroll grid (3-5 passes) → open product detail → scroll specs/reviews → select variant → add to cart → proceed checkout
